name: The AI Scientist
domain: ML research; general template for in-silico science
inputs: Research template, baseline code, topic area, model/API keys
outputs: Ideas, code, experiments, plots, paper draft, automated review
notes: Fully automated software-only ML research cycles (Sakana AI).

name: The AI Scientist-v2
inputs: Research topic/template and compute environment
outputs: Workshop-style paper, experiments, analysis, review traces
notes: Agentic tree-search successor; produced first AI-generated peer-review-accepted workshop paper.

name: AI-Researcher
inputs: Research objective or task; reference papers; benchmark settings
outputs: Literature review, hypothesis, implementation, manuscript
notes: End-to-end research automation with Scientist-Bench (NeurIPS 2025 spotlight).

name: Agent Laboratory
domain: General research assistant, strongest examples in ML
inputs: User idea and feedback checkpoints
outputs: Literature review, experiment code, report
notes: Steerable LLM-agent research workflow with human feedback at each stage.

name: Curie
inputs: Scientific question or paper to reproduce/extend
outputs: Experiment plan, code, results, interpretation
notes: Rigor-focused automated experimentation framework (pip curie-ai).

name: SciAgents
inputs: Knowledge graph, scientific prompt, literature-derived context
outputs: Cross-disciplinary hypotheses, candidate materials/ideas
notes: Multi-agent graph reasoning for discovery, esp. bio-inspired materials (Buehler group).

name: Denario
inputs: Research question, analysis task, or paper-writing task
outputs: Ideas, literature checks, plans, code, plots, draft paper
notes: Modular multi-agent research assistant; astrophysics roots, multi-domain demos.

name: ResearchAgent
inputs: Core scientific paper plus literature corpus
outputs: Iteratively refined research problems, methods, experiment designs
notes: Literature-grounded idea generation with LLM reviewing agents (NAACL 2025).

name: PaperQA2
inputs: Question plus paper corpus/web literature access
outputs: Cited answers, summaries, contradiction checks
notes: High-accuracy cited literature QA/review; superhuman synthesis claims (FutureHouse).

name: Google AI Co-Scientist
inputs: Research objective and scientist guidance
outputs: Ranked/evolved hypotheses and proposals
notes: Google Research multi-agent hypothesis-generation system evaluated in biomedical research. No official public implementation was confirmed; community reimplementations are not treated as evidence for the Google system.

name: Robin
inputs: Disease or biological objective
outputs: Therapeutic candidates, ranked evidence, validation workflow
notes: Lab-in-the-loop therapeutic discovery; identified ripasudil for dry AMD (Nature 2026).

name: ToolUniverse
inputs: Agent request requiring tools, APIs, models, databases
outputs: Tool calls, retrieved evidence, analysis artifacts
notes: Open ecosystem of 600-1000+ standardized tools for building biomedical/scientific agents (pip tooluniverse).

name: AgentRxiv
inputs: Agent-produced preprints and metadata
outputs: Shared/citable agent outputs retrievable by other agent labs
notes: Shared preprint-server framework for collaborative autonomous-agent research, built on Agent Laboratory.

name: Biomni
inputs: Biomedical task in natural language, files/data, access to tools/databases
outputs: Literature work, executed code, protocols, hypotheses, multi-domain analyses
notes: General-purpose biomedical AI agent (150 tools, 105 packages, 59 DBs) with hosted UI at biomni.stanford.edu.

name: STELLA
inputs: Biomedical benchmark/task plus tool needs
outputs: Evolving reasoning templates, auto-created tools, benchmark answers
notes: Self-evolving biomedical LLM agent with Template Library and dynamic Tool Ocean; multi-agent (manager/dev/critic/tool-creation).

name: BioInformatics Agent (BIA)
inputs: Natural-language bioinformatics task and datasets (esp. scRNA-seq)
outputs: Workflow design, executable code, comprehensive analytical reports
notes: Early LLM agent for autonomous bioinformatics workflows via chat interface.

name: CRISPR-GPT
inputs: Gene-editing goal, target/gene context, constraints
outputs: CRISPR system choice, gRNA designs, delivery method, protocol, assay/analysis plans
notes: LLM agent automating CRISPR experiment design; only a safety-limited 'light' version of code is public.

name: CellVoyager
inputs: AnnData .h5ad, dataset summary, prior analyses, focus directions
outputs: Jupyter-style scRNA-seq analyses, figures, biological hypotheses
notes: Autonomous scRNA-seq exploratory analysis agent (Zou group); also in Nature Methods.

name: SpatialAgent
inputs: Spatial transcriptomics / single-cell data and research question
outputs: Experimental design, multimodal analysis, hypotheses
notes: Autonomous agent for spatial biology (72 tools, 17 skill templates); Genentech.

name: OmniCellAgent
inputs: scRNA-seq/omics data and a disease/therapy question
outputs: Mechanism hypotheses, therapy candidates, analysis reports
notes: AI co-scientist for omics-driven precision medicine aimed at non-computational users.

name: KBase Research Agent
inputs: KBase narrative / systems-biology analysis task
outputs: Multi-agent KBase workflow, app execution, result summaries/reports
notes: LLM multi-agent (LangChain/LangGraph/CrewAI) workflow builder for DOE KBase.

name: BioGAIP
inputs: Natural-language bioinformatics task and data
outputs: Automated, user-friendly bioinformatics analysis workflow
notes: LLM-powered multi-agent system for automated bioinformatics tasks (Fudan University).

name: ToolsGenie 2.0
inputs: Natural-language bioinformatics task and file inputs
outputs: Tool-augmented, sandboxed bioinformatics analysis workflows
notes: Scalable multi-agent (ReAct) system for bioinformatics automation with Docker sandboxing.

name: Medea
inputs: Omics / therapeutic-discovery question
outputs: Transparent multi-step analyses, code execution, literature evidence, consensus therapeutic findings
notes: Verification-aware omics AI agent for therapeutic discovery (Zitnik lab, Harvard); 20 tools across single-cell/bulk transcriptomics, vulnerability maps, pathways.

name: TxAgent
inputs: Drug, disease, patient-context scenario, therapeutic question
outputs: Drug-interaction/contraindication analysis and treatment reasoning over 211 tools
notes: Therapeutic-reasoning agent (Zitnik lab) using ToolUniverse; research/decision-support, not a standalone clinical tool.

name: PharmAgents
inputs: Target/disease and small-molecule drug-discovery objective
outputs: Targets, lead compounds, affinity/property/toxicity/synthesizability analysis
notes: Virtual-pharma multi-agent concept spanning target discovery to preclinical evaluation.

name: DrugAgent
inputs: Drug-discovery ML programming task and data
outputs: ML pipeline code (Planner + Instructor agents), model selection, performance report
notes: Multi-agent drug-discovery workflow described in arXiv:2411.15692. The previously cited repository was a third-party reconstruction, not an author-owned release; no official runnable implementation was confirmed.

name: BioAgents
inputs: Bioinformatics task/data (e.g., genomics pipeline questions)
outputs: Automated pipeline analysis, troubleshooting, interpretation
notes: Microsoft multi-agent bioinformatics workflow-design and troubleshooting assistant with limited code generation; it does not autonomously execute complete scientific workflows. Official implementation is MIT-licensed.

name: MMedAgent
inputs: Multimodal medical task (image + text)
outputs: Tool-mediated medical reasoning across modalities (7 tasks, 6 tools)
notes: First multimodal medical tool-use agent (built on LLaVA-Plus/LLaVA-Med); EMNLP 2024 Findings.

name: BioPlanner
inputs: High-level biology protocol description plus admissible pseudocode functions
outputs: Reconstructed protocol pseudocode; automatic accuracy evaluation
notes: Benchmark (BioProt dataset) auto-evaluating LLM protocol planning in biology.

name: Talk2BioModels
inputs: Natural-language queries over SBML/BioModels kinetic models; uploaded papers for RAG
outputs: Model search, simulation/plotting, stability analysis, annotation retrieval
notes: Open-source agentic LLM platform for exploring kinetic biological (SBML) models.

name: BioTrouble
inputs: Molecular-biology troubleshooting description and protocol context
outputs: Diagnoses, suggested fixes, RAG-grounded reasoning with user feedback loop
notes: Multi-agent RAG workflow for troubleshooting wet-lab molecular biology techniques.

name: PantheonOS / Pantheon-Evolve
inputs: Single-cell/multi-omics analysis task and fitness/evaluation loop
outputs: Composed agent workflows; autonomously evolved bioinformatics algorithms (batch correction, gene-panel design)
notes: Evolvable multi-agent genomics framework; Pantheon-Evolve does agentic code evolution.

name: BioLab
domain: End-to-end life-sciences research with multi-agent system
inputs: Life-science research objective (e.g., target identification, antibody engineering)
outputs: Hypotheses, database queries, foundation-model predictions, experimental protocols; closed-loop wet-lab integration
notes: Eight-agent system over 219 xBio-Tools/xTrimo foundation models for end-to-end life-science research.

name: Coscientist
inputs: Chemistry objective, lab hardware/docs, web/literature context
outputs: Synthesis plans, robot/cloud-lab commands, experimental results, optimizations
notes: GPT-4 driven autonomous chemistry system that plans and runs experiments via a cloud robotic lab.

name: ChemCrow
inputs: Natural-language chemistry task
outputs: Tool calls, synthesis plans, property/drug/materials answers
notes: LLM chemistry agent integrating 18 expert tools across synthesis, drug and materials design.

name: CACTUS
inputs: Chemistry or molecular-discovery question
outputs: Property prediction, similarity, drug-likeness, reasoning
notes: PNNL cheminformatics tool-use agent (Chemistry Agent Connecting Tool-Usage to Science).

name: ChemToolAgent
inputs: Chemistry task needing general/molecule/reaction tools
outputs: Tool-mediated answer and analysis
notes: OSU-NLP chemistry agent studying when tools help LLMs; NAACL 2025 Findings.

name: ChemMCP
inputs: Agent requests for chemistry tools/data
outputs: Standardized chemistry tool calls (MCP)
notes: MCP-compatible chemistry toolkit; extends ChemToolAgent tools for building chemistry co-scientists.

name: ChemAgent (AI4Chem)
inputs: Chemistry reasoning task
outputs: Structured subtasks, memory-augmented answer
notes: Gerstein Lab ChemAgent: self-updating library/memory improves chemical reasoning; ICLR 2025.

name: ChemAgent (self-updating memory)
inputs: Chemistry reasoning task
outputs: Structured subtasks, memory-augmented answer
notes: Gerstein Lab ChemAgent: self-updating library/memory improves chemical reasoning; ICLR 2025.

name: MOOSE-Chem
inputs: Research question plus background survey
outputs: Rediscovered/generated chemistry hypotheses
notes: LLM framework that decomposes and rediscovers unseen chemistry hypotheses; ICLR 2025.

name: MOOSE-Chem2
inputs: Research background and target question
outputs: More detailed, lab-testable hypotheses
notes: Fine-grained scientific hypothesis discovery via hierarchical search; NeurIPS 2025.

name: ChemAgents robotic AI chemist
inputs: On-demand chemistry task and robot lab setup
outputs: Protocol execution, experimental data, task reports
notes: Hierarchical multi-agent (Llama-3-70B) robotic chemist; ChemRxiv preprint, published JACS 2025 (10.1021/jacs.4c17738).

name: LLM-RDF
inputs: Reaction target and synthesis-development objective
outputs: Literature extraction, condition screening, kinetics, optimization, scale-up
notes: Six-agent GPT-4 reaction development framework with web app for end-to-end synthesis development.

name: MADD
inputs: Drug design objective/properties (natural-language query)
outputs: De novo compound generation/screening, hit molecules, evaluation
notes: Multi-agent drug discovery orchestra (four agents) for hit identification; EMNLP 2025 Findings.

name: LIDDIA
inputs: Drug-discovery objective with target/property constraints
outputs: Generated and evaluated drug-candidate molecules
notes: Language-based intelligent drug discovery agent navigating in-silico discovery; EMNLP 2025.

name: dZiner
inputs: Target material/molecule requirements (property-to-structure)
outputs: Candidate designs and rationale with property inference
notes: Chemist AI agent for rational inverse design of materials (MOFs, surfactants, ligands).

name: LLaMP
inputs: Materials-science query/data
outputs: Materials knowledge retrieval, atomistic simulation orchestration, analysis
notes: Multimodal RAG framework of hierarchical ReAct agents grounded on Materials Project; EMNLP 2025.

name: PhysMaster
inputs: Physics research problem, literature, computation needs
outputs: Reasoning traces, simulations, hypothesis loops, candidate discoveries
notes: Autonomous AI physicist for theoretical/computational physics; uses LANDAU knowledge repository and adaptive exploration.

name: AI-Mandel
domain: Quantum physics idea generation and implementation
inputs: Quantum-physics literature/context and target area
outputs: Implementable quantum-optics experiment designs and follow-up ideas
notes: LLM multi-agent system that generates and executes novel quantum-optics ideas via PyTheus simulation.

name: PhysVEC
inputs: Paper-derived quantum many-body simulation task
outputs: Code, programming verification, scientific verification, corrections
notes: Verifiable, self-correcting AI-physicist framework for quantum many-body simulations; introduces QMP-Bench.

name: Dr.Sai
inputs: Natural-language HEP analysis request
outputs: Simulation/reconstruction/statistical workflow and results
notes: Computational agent for BESIII data analysis, simulation, reconstruction, and statistics. It does not control the collider or detector, so physical-lab gating is not claimed.

name: OpenFOAMGPT
inputs: Natural-language CFD/OpenFOAM task
outputs: Case setup, boundary/model changes, code translation, simulation iterations
notes: RAG-augmented single-agent LLM for OpenFOAM CFD; human oversight still important.

name: Foam-Agent
inputs: Natural-language OpenFOAM/CFD objective
outputs: Pre-processing, solver setup, HPC scripts, post-processing visualization
notes: Multi-agent end-to-end OpenFOAM CFD framework (Architect/Input Writer/Runner/Reviewer); 88.2% success on 110 tasks.

name: MetaOpenFOAM / sim-cli
inputs: CFD setup request
outputs: OpenFOAM setup and workflow automation
notes: LLM multi-agent CFD framework; repo deprecated, capabilities migrated to sim-cli (github.com/svd-ai-lab/sim-cli).

name: MechAgents
inputs: Elasticity/mechanics problem
outputs: FEM code (FEniCS), execution, self-correction, plots/results
notes: Multi-agent LLM collaboration for mechanics/FEM problems (Ni & Buehler, MIT); published in Extreme Mechanics Letters 2024.

name: MooseAgent
inputs: MOOSE/FEM multiphysics task in natural language
outputs: Auto-generated MOOSE input files, solver configuration, post-processing
notes: LLM multi-agent framework automating MOOSE finite-element simulations via task decomposition and iterative verification.

name: VFEAgent
inputs: Multimodal FEA problem (input images plus problem description)
outputs: Complete, physically valid finite-element simulations
notes: Vision-language multi-agent framework for end-to-end automated finite-element analysis with self-debugging code synthesis.

name: Get Physics Done (GPD)
inputs: Physics question / research objective
outputs: Scoped workflow, derivations, verification scripts, packaged research artifacts
notes: Open-source agentic AI physicist (PSI PBC); four-stage formulate/plan/execute/verify workflow installable into Claude Code, Gemini CLI, Codex, etc.

name: Anubuddhi
inputs: Natural-language quantum-optics prompt
outputs: Designed and simulated quantum-optics experiment (optical layout + physics simulation)
notes: Multi-agent AI system designing/simulating quantum-optics experiments (HOM, Bell states, teleportation, boson sampling) from natural language.

name: LLM-SR
inputs: Observational data/problem
outputs: Candidate symbolic equations/programs
notes: Scientific equation discovery combining LLM code generation with evolutionary search; ICLR 2025 Oral.

name: Gravity-Bench
inputs: Agent benchmark tasks (gravitational dynamics simulations, experimental budget)
outputs: Scores on gravitational-physics discovery tasks
notes: Benchmark on gravitational-physics discovery for agents (Gravity-Bench-v1); ICML 2025. Includes HF dataset.

name: ScienceAgentBench
inputs: Real paper-derived data-analysis task with dataset and instructions
outputs: Self-contained Python program scored on execution/success metrics
notes: Benchmark for agents that generate and execute scientific-analysis code. The official repository released a verified dataset/artifact revision on 30 April 2026 to mitigate false negatives and directs users to the Hugging Face verified split and benchmark_verified.zip.

name: DiscoveryWorld
inputs: Simulated discovery-environment challenge task
outputs: Agent actions through hypothesis/experiment/analysis cycle; task scores
notes: Virtual environment with 120 tasks across 8 topics for evaluating automated scientific-discovery agents.

name: ResearchBench
inputs: Paper-derived research question, background survey, candidate inspirations
outputs: Scores on inspiration retrieval, hypothesis composition, hypothesis ranking
notes: Benchmark decomposing scientific discovery into inspiration-based sub-tasks across 12 disciplines.

name: Auto-Bench
inputs: Interactive causal-graph-discovery task (chemistry or social-network setting) with oracle queries
outputs: Inferred causal structure, intervention decisions, justifications; performance scores
notes: Automated benchmark testing LLMs on causal-graph scientific discovery via iterative intervention.

name: Scientist-Bench
inputs: AI-research paper tasks for guided innovation and open-ended exploration
outputs: Evaluation of autonomous research outputs (idea, implementation, manuscript)
notes: Benchmark introduced alongside the AI-Researcher system for assessing autonomous AI-research agents.

name: BioDSA-1K
inputs: Biomedical hypothesis plus supporting data tables and analysis plan
outputs: Hypothesis decision, evidence-conclusion alignment, reasoning, executable analysis code
notes: Benchmark of 1,029 hypothesis-centric biomedical data-science tasks from 300+ published studies.

name: GenoTEX
inputs: Gene-trait association problem with raw gene-expression datasets
outputs: Dataset selection, preprocessing and statistical-analysis code/results; alignment with expert annotations
notes: Expert-curated benchmark for automated gene-expression analysis with a GenoAgent baseline.

name: QMB100 / QMP-Bench
inputs: End-to-end quantum-many-body simulation task extracted from research articles
outputs: Simulation code, verification evidence, corrected results; benchmark scores
notes: QMB100: 100 research-level quantum-many-body simulation tasks from 21 articles, introduced with PhysVEC.

name: PRL-Bench
inputs: Frontier-physics research task derived from recent Physical Review Letters papers
outputs: End-to-end physics-research workflow with verifiable scores across five subfields
notes: Benchmark of 100 curated PRL-derived tasks evaluating LLMs on frontier physics research.

name: OpenClaw ecosystem
inputs: Curated dataset of scientific-agent projects and reusable skills
outputs: Catalog of 91 projects / 2,230 skills across 34 categories; hosted platform
notes: Claw4Science dataset/platform cataloging the OpenClaw scientific-agent ecosystem (skills libraries, not a single benchmark).

name: Agentic Science survey and list
inputs: Literature on autonomous scientific-discovery agents
outputs: Taxonomy/survey and curated paper list across life sciences, chemistry, materials, physics
notes: Survey 'From AI for Science to Agentic Science' with companion curated list, not a runnable benchmark.

name: Awesome LLM Scientific Discovery
inputs: Papers/tools at the intersection of LLMs and scientific discovery
outputs: Curated, autonomy-leveled bibliography of LLM scientific-discovery research
notes: Curated list backing the survey 'From Automation to Autonomy' (EMNLP 2025); not a single system or benchmark.

name: Awesome bioagent papers
inputs: Papers on LLM-based agents in biology and medicine
outputs: Auto-updated curated lists of bio-agent papers, benchmarks, and reviews
notes: Agent-maintained (Pantheon) tracker of bio/medical agent papers; a bibliography, not a system.

name: Kosmos
inputs: Open-ended objective plus dataset or organizational data
outputs: Code, literature search, hypothesis branches, cited report
notes: Long-running autonomous AI scientist (Edison Scientific/FutureHouse); hosted via platform.edisonscientific.com.

name: Edison Scientific platform agents (formerly FutureHouse): Crow, Falcon, Owl, Phoenix
aliases: FutureHouse platform agents: Crow, Falcon, Owl, Phoenix
inputs: Research question, papers, chemistry task, prior-art search
outputs: Scholarly cited answers, deep reviews, prior-art checks, chemistry plans
notes: Named hosted agents launched by FutureHouse on May 1, 2025: Crow (general QA), Falcon (deep review), Owl (prior-work/precedent), and Phoenix (chemistry planning). The hosted platform is now operated by Edison Scientific, a commercial spinout announced in November 2025; FutureHouse continues as a nonprofit research organization.

name: PaperQA3 / Edison Literature
inputs: Scientific query plus papers, figures, tables, patents
outputs: Cited multimodal literature synthesis answers
notes: PaperQA3 powers the hosted Edison/FutureHouse Literature agent; multimodal successor to PaperQA2.

name: Microsoft Discovery
inputs: Organizational data, models, tools, research goal
outputs: Hypotheses, simulations, analyses, knowledge-graph artifacts
notes: Enterprise agentic R&D platform on Azure; now GA, used for Majorana 2 quantum chip and materials R&D.

name: BIOS / BioAgent Deep Research
inputs: Biomedical objective and datasets
outputs: Literature review, data analysis, hypotheses, novelty checks
notes: bio.xyz biology deep-research system (paper system named 'Deep Research'); SOTA on BixBench; productized as BIOS at chat.bio.xyz.

name: InternAgent / NovelSeek
inputs: Research goal, tools, code or empirical setting
outputs: Algorithms, experiments, reports
notes: Closed-loop multi-agent discovery system across 12 tasks; NovelSeek was the original name, renamed InternAgent July 2025.

name: InternAgent-1.5
inputs: Research goal, tools, code/lab setting
outputs: Algorithms, dry/wet experiments, reports
notes: Successor to InternAgent: generation/verification/evolution subsystems, long-horizon memory; leads GAIA/HLE/GPQA/FrontierScience.

name: DeepScientist
inputs: Goal, metric, compute budget
outputs: Validated findings and improved methods
notes: Month-scale autonomous discovery as Bayesian optimization; ICLR 2026; ~5000 ideas, ~1100 validated, beat SOTA on 3 AI tasks.

name: EvoScientist
inputs: Research goal, code environment, persistent memory
outputs: Ideas, experiments, code, paper artifacts
notes: Self-evolving multi-agent AI scientist with ideation/experimentation memory; Researcher/Engineer/Evolution-Manager agents.

name: EvoMaster
inputs: Scientific-agent population and evaluation tasks; base harness config
outputs: Evolving autonomous scientific agents and performance results
notes: Foundational evolving agent framework (~100 LOC to build a scientific agent); SciMaster/ML-Master/X-Master built on it.

name: SciDER
inputs: Raw scientific data plus research intent
outputs: Data summaries, hypotheses, experiments, paper draft
notes: Data-centric end-to-end researcher; 4 sub-agents; releases OpenSciDER-SFT-8K dataset and OpenSciDER-27B model.

name: Jr. AI Scientist
inputs: Baseline paper and repository
outputs: Limitations, hypotheses, implementation, manuscript
notes: Extends a given baseline paper (analyze limits -> hypothesize -> experiment -> write); UTokyo; TMLR 2026.

name: MARS
inputs: ML research repo/task plus budget
outputs: Modular code, experiments, learned search insights
notes: Budget-aware reflective search for automated AI research; cost-constrained MCTS; competitive on MLE-Bench.

name: AutoSOTA
inputs: Paper and codebase
outputs: Repaired environment, optimization ideas, patches, improved SOTA results
notes: Reproduces and empirically improves SOTA AI models; 8-agent system; discovered 105 improved models.

name: Deep Researcher Agent
inputs: DL project, logs, baselines
outputs: Overnight experiments, analyses, refinements
notes: 24/7 deep-learning experimentation loop with zero-cost monitoring and bounded memory; UTokyo; 30+ day runs.

name: EurekAgent
inputs: Metric and executable environment
outputs: Improved solutions, artifacts, logs
notes: Environment-engineering approach (permissions/artifacts/budget/human-in-loop) coordinating CLI agents; SOTA on math/kernel/MLE-Bench tasks.

name: CodeScientist
inputs: Articles, code blocks, experiment environment
outputs: Candidate discoveries, experiments, soundness/novelty checks
notes: Code-based semi-automated discovery via genetic search over papers+codeblocks; AI2; ACL 2025 Findings; Apache 2.0.

name: Asta agents
inputs: Search, synthesis, data-analysis tasks
outputs: Literature/data answers, agent workflow artifacts
notes: AI2 scientific assistant ecosystem (search + synthesis + data analysis over 100M+ abstracts).

name: PiFlow
inputs: Discovery objective and uncertainty-reduction principles
outputs: Agent plans, experiments, optimized candidates
notes: Principle-aware multi-agent discovery as uncertainty reduction; plug-and-play; tested on nanomaterials, biomolecules, superconductors.

name: AlphaResearch
inputs: Open-ended algorithmic problem and an executable evaluation environment
outputs: Candidate algorithms, code, execution/performance traces, simulated peer-review scores
notes: Autonomous algorithm-discovery agent combining execution-verifiable reward with a simulated peer-review reward model.

name: OpenScientist
inputs: Scientist-defined biomedical query plus data (EHR, omics, imaging, histopathology, biomarkers, tabular/text)
outputs: Autonomous hypotheses, computational analyses, literature-grounded mechanistic insights, verifiable findings
notes: Open, auditable agentic biomedical co-scientist (Claude Sonnet 4.5, Agent Skills + MCP, Docker UI at localhost:8080).

name: Medical AI Scientist
inputs: Clinical/medical-AI research task, data modality (images, video, EHR, ECG, reports, multimodal), benchmark case
outputs: Idea proposals, experimental pipelines, evidence-grounded manuscript drafts, Med-AI-Bench results
notes: Autonomous clinical-research framework (Idea Proposer, Experimental Executor, Manuscript Composer) with clinician-engineer co-reasoning.

name: FARS
inputs: Research objective (currently AI/LLM research domain)
outputs: Autonomous ideation, plans, experiments on GPU cluster, complete written papers
notes: Analemma Intelligence's Fully Automated Research System; four agents (Ideation, Planning, Experiment, Writing), publicly livestreamed producing 100 papers.

name: OpenAI Deep Research
inputs: Natural-language prompt, optional files, web-browsing scope
outputs: Multi-step, inline-cited research report
notes: OpenAI's hosted agentic deep-research capability (o3-based, browsing + sandboxed Python); broadly accessible via ChatGPT/API.

name: Lila Sciences
inputs: Human-guided scientific goals across life, chemical, materials science
outputs: Hypotheses, autonomous experiment designs, lab results (AI Science Factory)
notes: Flagship-Pioneering-founded scientific-superintelligence platform with autonomous labs; closed commercial system.

name: Periodic Labs
inputs: Physical-science / materials objectives (e.g. superconductors, semiconductors)
outputs: Autonomous experiments, high-quality experimental data, materials insights
notes: Commercial 'AI scientist' paired with autonomous physical-science labs; founders from ChatGPT and DeepMind GNoME.

name: BioDiscoveryAgent
inputs: Phenotype goal, prior perturbation results, biomedical literature
outputs: Proposed gene perturbation batches for the next experimental round
notes: Closed-loop LLM agent for designing genetic (Perturb-seq) perturbation experiments.

name: GeneAgent
inputs: Gene sets
outputs: Functional annotations with self-verification against domain databases
notes: Self-verifying LLM agent for gene-set analysis using expert-curated databases.

name: AutoBA
inputs: Omics data files and natural-language analysis task
outputs: Analysis plans, code, plots, reports
notes: Autonomous AI agent for fully automated multi-omic bioinformatics analysis.

name: CellAgent
inputs: scRNA-seq / spatial transcriptomics data and natural-language task
outputs: Automated Scanpy-style analyses (QC, clustering, annotation, DE, trajectory)
notes: LLM-driven Planner/Executor/Evaluator multi-agent for single-cell analysis.

name: BioMaster
inputs: Bioinformatics task and data (RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, single-cell, Hi-C, nanopore, etc.)
outputs: Workflow design, executed scripts, validation, interpretation
notes: Plan/Task/Debug/Check multi-agent system for automated bioinformatics workflows.

name: CompBioAgent
inputs: scRNA-seq dataset and natural-language query (CellDepot-backed)
outputs: Structured data requests, filtering, and visualizations (UMAP, violin, heatmap)
notes: LLM-powered web agent for natural-language single-cell RNA-seq exploration.

name: BioMANIA
inputs: Omics task and a documented open-source Python tool's APIs/docs
outputs: Conversational tool/API calls, executed analyses, reports
notes: Conversational AI pipeline that learns Python tool APIs to automate bioinformatics analysis.

name: scChat
inputs: scRNA-seq data and study/research context
outputs: Contextualized analysis suggestions, reasoning, and hypotheses
notes: LLM-powered co-pilot for contextualized single-cell RNA-seq analysis.

name: FlowAgent
domain: Autonomous bioinformatics workflow planning, execution, recovery, and interpretation
inputs: Bioinformatics goals, datasets, local/HPC environments, tool documentation, and workflow failures
outputs: Executed shell/Nextflow/Snakemake workflows, QC reports, checkpointed recovery, interpretations, and final results
notes: Modular agent-based system for automated bioinformatics workflow management.

name: TransAgent
inputs: Epigenomic/transcriptomic multi-omics data and analysis task
outputs: Transcriptional-regulation analyses and workflows (30+ tools, 20+ data sources)
notes: Multi-omics-aware LLM agent for transcriptional regulation analysis.

name: TAIS / GenoMAS
inputs: Gene-expression datasets (GEO/TCGA)
outputs: Disease-predictive genes, analysis code, reports
notes: Multi-agent (PM/data-engineer/domain-expert) framework for gene-expression discovery; GenoMAS is the newer version.

name: PerTurboAgent
inputs: Initial Perturb-seq data and experimental objective
outputs: Predicted gene modules and candidate gene panels for next perturbation round
notes: Self-planning LLM agent for designing iterative/sequential Perturb-seq experiments.

name: PhenoGraph
inputs: Spatial transcriptomics data and a phenotype-driven query
outputs: Auto-selected/executed analysis pipelines and interpretable phenotype findings
notes: LLM multi-agent framework for phenotype-driven spatial transcriptomics discovery, augmented with knowledge graphs.

name: PROTEUS
inputs: Raw proteomics/multiomics datasets
outputs: Research objectives, statistical analyses, and ranked biological hypotheses
notes: Fully automated LLM system for exploratory proteomics/multiomics hypothesis generation.

name: OmicsNavigator
inputs: Spatial omics data (with free-form text queries)
outputs: Zero-shot structural annotations, pathology assessments, expert-like biological summaries
notes: LLM-driven multi-agent system for autonomous zero-shot biological analysis in spatial omics.

name: scBaseCount / SRAgent
inputs: SRA records / public scRNA-seq accessions
outputs: Standardized, uniformly processed h5ad/count single-cell datasets and curated metadata
notes: Arc Institute AI-agent (SRAgent) that mines SRA to build/maintain the scBaseCount single-cell repository.

name: MRAgent
inputs: Disease/topic plus literature and GWAS data
outputs: Discovered exposure-outcome pairs and Mendelian-randomization causal-inference reports
notes: LLM agent automating Mendelian-randomization causal knowledge discovery in disease.

name: HypoGeneAgent
inputs: Perturb-seq gene programs / cluster gene sets
outputs: Ranked GO-based hypotheses with confidence scores and a resolution/agreement score
notes: LLM hypothesis agent for gene-set cluster resolution selection in Perturb-seq data.

name: PlantGPT
inputs: Natural-language questions about Arabidopsis plant functional genomics
outputs: RAG-grounded, hallucination-limited functional-genomics answers
notes: Arabidopsis-focused RAG + fine-tuned LLM (Llama3-8B) agent for plant functional genomics QA.
